name: Mushroom Mornay Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Can condensed Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Desired hot cooked vegetables
2. In a 1 1/2-quart saucepan, stir the soup; stir in milk and mustard until smooth.
3. Over medium heat, heat through, stirring occasionally.
4. In a small cup, lightly beat the egg. Stir some of the hot soup mixture into the beaten egg.
5. Stir the egg mixture back into the soup in the saucepan.
6. Over low heat, cook until the mixture thickens, stirring constantly.
7. Do not boil! Remove from heat. Stir in Swiss and Parmesan cheese.
8. Cook until the cheese melts. Serve over vegetables. Makes about 2 cups sauce.
